report.summary: Steady cycle: 554 published pages (+55 uncommitted from batches 12-21), 25 new learn pages created, 102 TS errors unchanged in 4 files, 0/6 API routes rate-limited, 195 uncommitted files awaiting commit+deploy.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 554 published slugs in working tree (up from ~499 committed via +55 new entries across batches 12-21 and Mar 27 cycle), 2 in PUBLISH_QUEUE
25 new untracked learn page.tsx files since last deploy — including ai-agent-frameworks, aptos, crypto-options-strategies, defi-insurance, socialfi, rwa-platforms, solver-networks, and more
5 new non-learn published slugs added: crypto-loans/calculators/loan-calculator, ltv-calculator, exchanges/best/bitcoin, exchanges/best/usa, crypto-cards compare

102 TypeScript errors in 4 app files (UNCHANGED from prior cycle): lido-v3-stvaults (94 JSX syntax), crypto-arbitrage (4 unescaped >), institutional-adoption (2 unescaped $1B), crypto-index-funds (2 unescaped >)
structured-data.examples.ts still has ~40 TS errors — reference file, not imported in build
103 published slugs still missing page.tsx files (pre-existing backlog, unchanged)
Build uses ignoreBuildErrors: true — TS errors do not block Vercel deploys

10 modified learn pages in working tree (bitcoin-safe-haven, bitgo-ipo, congressional-tokenization, institutional-adoption, katana-perps, layer-3-chains, leveraged-tokens, lido-v3, onchain-order-book, tokenized-funds)
No new regressions detected — error set is stable

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API routes present and structurally intact: prices, trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields

Cache TTLs verified: prices (s-maxage=60, swr=120), trending (s-maxage=300, swr=600), fear-greed (s-maxage=600, swr=1200), market-metrics (s-maxage=60, swr=120), market-dominance (s-maxage=300, swr=600), defi-yields (s-maxage=60)
Fallback data: only prices and market-dominance have FALLBACK_DATA. 4 routes (trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, defi-yields) still lack fallbacks
CRITICAL: 0/6 API routes have rate limiting. Rate limiter at src/lib/rate-limiter.ts remains unused. CoinGecko free tier unprotected.
New API route detected: /api/notifications/feed (untracked) — likely for NotificationCenter component
Cannot verify live responses from sandbox — no stale data anomalies detectable offline

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest deployed commit: 21aaf5b (batch deploy: 170+ pages, 18 guides, 5 ecosystem pages, OG images, UX fixes)
195 uncommitted files: 167 untracked + 28 modified (up from 168 in prior cycle — grew by 27)
37 new OG SVG images untracked in public/ directory
Modified tracked files include: globals.css, published-pages.ts, 10 learn pages, NotificationCenter.tsx, WhaleAlertFeed.tsx, 5 OG SVGs
No new commits or deploys since last cycle — production still running commit 21aaf5b
next.config.ts: standalone output, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency=4, workerThreads=false, ignoreBuildErrors=true
Cannot verify live Vercel deployment status from sandbox (degen0x.com egress blocked)

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Delta this cycle: 25 new learn pages created, 55 new slugs added to published-pages.ts, 37 new OG images, 10 existing pages modified
New content areas: AI agent frameworks, Aptos, DeFi insurance, DVT, Ethereum Verkle trees, Morpho protocol, Nasdaq tokenized equities, on-chain privacy, solver networks, SocialFi, and more
BLOCKER [P0]: 195 uncommitted files need commit + push + Vercel deploy. Content accumulating faster than deploys — gap widening (168→195 in one cycle)
Carry-over [P1]: Fix 4 learn pages with JSX escaping errors (lido-v3, crypto-arbitrage, institutional-adoption, crypto-index-funds) — 102 errors
Carry-over [P1]: Add rate limiting to 6 API routes — rate limiter module exists but unused
Carry-over [P2]: Add fallback data to 4 API routes (trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, defi-yields)
Carry-over [P2]: 103 published slugs missing page.tsx files (long-standing backlog)
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 pages remaining (initia-blockchain, kite-ai-payment-blockchain)
